task:
If you look at https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/issues/592 https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/issues/582 https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/issues/578 There are minimax issue. 

My .envrc has MINIMAX_API_KEY which works with credit, write tests to ensure every fix is done, I'll add this secret to the repo too for the CI jobs. Add something to detect models too so when new models are available, I'm aware of it and we can fix it.

We'll do the same things with other providers. I'll add all API keys.
user_feedback_text:
If you look at https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/issues/592 https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/issues/582 https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/issues/578 There are minimax issue. 

My .envrc has MINIMAX_API_KEY which works with credit, write tests to ensure every fix is done, I'll add this secret to the repo too for the CI jobs. Add something to detect models too so when new models are available, I'm aware of it and we can fix it.

We'll do the same things with other providers. I'll add all API keys.
